svg.title: Complete Architecture of the ARPES Explorer Application
svg.desc: Comprehensive diagram of layers, data flows, modules, contracts, caches, UI controls, analyses, and tests for the local ARPES Explorer application.
svg.text: PyQt6 + Matplotlib for ARPES: data/logbook ingestion, EF/Gamma calibration, BM/MDC/FS/KZ, FS-BM pairing, DFT, analysis, and export.
Generated from local code. Goal: visualize real dependencies and execution flows without conceptual shortcuts.
Still exposes legacy methods through proxy_map.
Principle: declarative UI, domain logic in controllers/physics/io.
Receives: already prepared data or controller callbacks.
fit_runner, fit_zones, gamma, norm, distortion, pocket
redraw, fit, overlays, caches, pure-module calls.
Each controller writes parent through allowlisted attributes or proxies.
Allows progressive redesign without breaking Qt signals or tests.
Risk: implicit API; mitigation: smoke tests and fail-loud AttributeError.
Final goal: reduce legacy surface once controllers stabilize.
2. File ingestion, logbooks, and ARPESData normalization
BESSY SES/R8000: IBW v5 + note SES
CLS FS: FS folder + Cycle/Step + FS_param.txt
Theory: Materials Project or local files
detect_scan_kind: BM, FS, KZ, EDC, unknown
ARPESData(data, energy, kx, ky, hv, metadata)
kx/ky en pi/a, FS metadata shape (ny,nx,nE).
erlab.io da30, E-EF = eV - (hv - phi) + EF offset,
Manual IBW v5, [SES] note, hv via file/logbook/manual,
E/theta/P axes, FS if 3D, energy warnings.
Param files, Cycle/Step, cache FS mean, P/T motors,
Read CSV/XLSX, header detection, column mapping,
azi, polar, tilt, formula, mp_id, crystal_a.
KZ row disambiguation: identical File + Spectrum Name.
Priority source when raw file lacks reliable metadata.
Prepare FileEntry, hv source, work_func, lattice a,
Force reload if a lattice / phi / offsets change.
Bridge between UI/session and pure IO.
Cache key inclut path signature, params, hv, phi, a, offsets
Menu: reload without cache, clear cache, toggle disk cache
Goal: accelerate reload without hiding metadata changes.
3. Domain model, session, and value provenance
Preserve dirty worktree/session state; backup option.
FitParams: ranges E/k, n_pairs, widths, smoothing,
gamma init/max, k0, shape, resolution, pairs.
FileMeta: hv, T, direction, pol, meas_no, azi,
polar, tilt, loader, source_format, formula, mp_id, a/c.
Extras: fs center, fs lattice, grid, EF, distortion,
theory overlay, band analysis, pockets, annotations.
Gamma/Fit summaries, detected file tags, axis guards.
Goal: track file vs logbook vs manual vs session.
Undo, tags, notes, export, and diff
UndoStack keeps snapshots for sensitive actions.
File tags and session notes through UI panels.
1. Displayed energy = E - EF if calibration is known.
4. kx/ky displayed in pi/a, not A^-1.
5. Every automatic correction must leave warning/source.
These invariants control Gamma, KZ, FS-BM, and DFT.
Recommended pre-release run: selected test suite + smoke.
color cache, selection lines, ROI, EF, Gamma, theory, kF.
Interactions: click map, scroll zoom, ROI fit, annotation.
Future optimization: imshow if regular axes, overlay-only selection.
Drag kF init, snap-to-peak, fit annotations.
Likely hot path: cla/tight_layout on every redraw.
extract_fs_map: EF integration, norm flux, smoothing,
Draw: FS image, BZ, MP crystal BZ, pockets, BM cuts.
Gamma FS detect, manual center, save center.
Debounced redraw 150 ms; 1-entry distortion volume cache.
Parameters V0, a, c, E window, bins.
Fold kz to 1BZ, plot intensity, Gamma/Z labels.
Strongly depends on reliable logbook hv mapping.
MP band structures/lattice cache, local DFT bands,
3D FS DFT grid for pocket comparison.
Optional overlay, never the single source of ARPES data.
Lorentzian/Voigt MDC, fit zones, quality metrics.
FS pockets: contour, radial MDC, Luttinger, bootstrap.
Band analysis panel: TB, kink, gap, summary HTML.
Verify format detection, loaders, scoped logbooks,
KZ hnu, FS-BM pairing, scan_kind, cache signatures.
Cover display caches, MDC/EDC curves, Gamma,
FS map, KZ dataset, overlays, smoke UI headless.
1. Conventions axes: E-EF, pi/a, shapes BM/FS.
2. Loader order: BESSY vs Solaris IBW, CLS folder detection.
3. Scoped logbook: do not mix BNA_S1/BNA_S2.
4. Gamma/EF: never apply an offset twice.
Profiling per draw, imshow fallback pcolormesh,
overlay-only E/k selection, reused MDC/EDC artists,
FS collect_cuts cache, display downsample if measurement proves it.
Legend: blue = UI/events, green = IO ingestion, violet = model/session, orange = rendering/analysis, red = invariants/risks. Displayed paths are the main source files, not an exhaustive helper list.
